rationale: The citing paper references Lim (2010) only in the related-literature section as part of a grouped claim that social loss aversion can influence productivity in sales contest settings. It does not build its model, identification, hypotheses, or empirical design on Lim's contest-design framework, and Lim is not revisited in the analysis or interpretation sections. The citation functions as background context for behavioral-economics work rather than a paper-specific building block.
